title: 3997 BBY
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{Year |image=[[File:Kun_vs_Qel-Droma.jpg]] |conflict=[[Krath Holy Crusade]]''[[The New Essential Chronology]]'' |chancellor=[[Sidrona]][[Tales of the Jedi – The Sith War 2|''Tales of the Jedi – The Sith War'' 2]] |chief= |head= |emperor= |events= |eras=[[Old Republic era]]}} {{Quote|The Dark Lords of the Sith have risen again. Together, we will bring down the galaxy!|Exar Kun to Ulic Qel-Droma|audio=TogetherWeWillBringDownTheGalaxy.flac|[[Tales of the Jedi: Dark Lords of the Sith (audio drama)|''Tales of the Jedi: Dark Lords of the Sith'' audio drama]]}} The following events took place in '''3997 [[Galactic Standard Calendar|BBY]]'''. ==Events== {{Quote|Exar Kun, because of you, the Sith will never die. You have earned the right to bear the mark of Dark Lord of the Sith.|Marka Ragnos, appointing Exar Kun as Dark Lord|audio=ExarKunCrownedDarkLord-DLOTS.flac|}} *The Keto cousins [[Political uprising of the Empress Teta system|stage a military and political coup]] in the Empress Teta system, seizing control of the system from their parents as they establish power around their [[Sith cult/Legends|Sith cult]] known as the [[Krath/Legends|Krath]]. The coup begins the [[Krath Holy Crusade]].[[Tales of the Jedi – Dark Lords of the Sith 1|''Tales of the Jedi – Dark Lords of the Sith'' 1]] *A [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Republic]] and [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] task force comes to the aid of the planet [[Empress Teta/Legends|Empress Teta]], which has managed to hold off the [[Krath/Legends|Krath]], but the [[Sith/Legends|Sith]] cult drives the Republic out of the system at the [[Battle of Koros Major]]. [[Ulic Qel-Droma/Legends|Ulic Qel-Droma]] is infected by [[Aleema Keto]]'s [[Sith sorcery/Legends|Sith magic]] during an attack on the Republic's command ship ''[[Reliance I]]'', and he unknowingly begins to slip towards the dark side.[[Tales of the Jedi – Dark Lords of the Sith 2|''Tales of the Jedi – Dark Lords of the Sith'' 2]] *The Jedi [[Conclave at Deneba|Conclave on Deneba]] is [[Battle of Deneba|disrupted]] by Krath war droids, and the servant droids at the conclave attack the Jedi at the event. The Jedi destroy their attackers, but Arca Jeth is killed by Krath droids in the battle.[[Tales of the Jedi – Dark Lords of the Sith 3|''Tales of the Jedi – Dark Lords of the Sith'' 3]] *Ulic Qel-Droma attempts to infiltrate the Krath from within, but is seduced to the dark side by Aleema Keto. Qel-Droma [[Duel in the Iron Citadel (Satal Keto)|kills]] Satal and becomes the Krath's leader alongside Aleema, and a Jedi [[Mission to Empress Teta|rescue mission]] fails when Qel-Droma refuses to depart.[[Tales of the Jedi – Dark Lords of the Sith 5|''Tales of the Jedi – Dark Lords of the Sith'' 5]] *Around the same time, The power-hungry Jedi [[Exar Kun/Legends|Exar Kun]] searches for Sith teachings and discovers the spirit of [[Freedon Nadd]] on Onderon's moon [[Dxun/Legends|Dxun]], where he is trained in the ways of the dark side before heading to [[Yavin 4/Legends|Yavin 4]] to acquire more power. Kun ultimately kills Nadd's spirit and seeks out Ulic Qel-Droma to eliminate a potential rival.[[Tales of the Jedi – Dark Lords of the Sith 4|''Tales of the Jedi – Dark Lords of the Sith'' 4]] *[[Nomi Sunrider]] organizes a [[Battle of Empress Teta|second rescue mission]] at the same time that Kun arrives on Empress Teta, and Kun and Qel-Droma clash in a [[Duel in the Iron Citadel (Exar Kun)|duel]]. However, the duel is ended by the spirit of [[Marka Ragnos]], who anoints Kun and Qel-Droma as Dark Lords of the Sith as well as Master and apprentice. Joining forces with Kun, Qel-Droma refuses Sunrider's attempt a rescue, and the two Sith form the [[Brotherhood of the Sith]].[[Tales of the Jedi – Dark Lords of the Sith 6|''Tales of the Jedi – Dark Lords of the Sith'' 6]] ==Battles== {{Quote|There's only ''one'' way to deal with Arca's killer!''"
"''Careful, Jedi. Didn't your Master tell you that ''anger'' is ''not'' the way?!|Ulic Qel-Droma and Satal Keto, as they duel|audio=UlicandSatal-FaceOff.flac|[[Tales of the Jedi – Dark Lords of the Sith 5|''Tales of the Jedi – Dark Lords of the Sith'' 5]]}} *[[Battle of Koros Major]] *[[Battle of Deneba]] *[[Mission to Empress Teta]] *[[Battle of Empress Teta|Second Battle of Empress Teta]] ==Deaths== {{Quote|Oh, father, stop all that noise.''"
"''He always was such a windbag, Satal.''"
"''Not for much longer, Aleema. Lower him into the carbonite!|Satal and Aleema Keto|audio=TheDeathOfKeto-DLOTS.flac|}} *[[Halkans]] *[[Arca Jeth]] in the [[Battle of Deneba]] *[[Satal Keto/Legends|Satal Keto]] in the [[Battle of Empress Teta|Second Battle of Empress Teta]] ==Appearances== *[[Tales of the Jedi: Dark Lords of the Sith (audio drama)|''Tales of the Jedi: Dark Lords of the Sith'' audio drama]] *[[Tales of the Jedi – Dark Lords of the Sith 1|''Tales of the Jedi – Dark Lords of the Sith'' 1]] {{1st}} *[[Tales of the Jedi – Dark Lords of the Sith 2|''Tales of the Jedi – Dark Lords of the Sith'' 2]] *[[Tales of the Jedi – Dark Lords of the Sith 3|''Tales of the Jedi – Dark Lords of the Sith'' 3]] *[[Tales of the Jedi – Dark Lords of the Sith 4|''Tales of the Jedi – Dark Lords of the Sith'' 4]] *[[Tales of the Jedi – Dark Lords of the Sith 5|''Tales of the Jedi – Dark Lords of the Sith'' 5]] *[[Tales of the Jedi – Dark Lords of the Sith 6|''Tales of the Jedi – Dark Lords of the Sith'' 6]] *''[[Star Wars: The Old Republic]]'' {{Codex}} ==Sources== *[[The Essential Chronology (real-world book)|''The Essential Chronology'']] *''[[The Dark Side Sourcebook]]'' *''[[The New Essential Chronology]]'' *{{InsiderCite|88|Heritage of the Sith}} *[[Jedi vs. Sith: The Essential Guide to the Force (real-life book)|''Jedi vs. Sith: The Essential Guide to the Force'']] *''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' *{{TORweb|url=holonet/galactic-history|text=Timeline 10: The Exar Kun War|int=Timeline 10: The Exar Kun War}} {{Hologram}} ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} ---- {{Years-OSW}} {{Interlang |de=3997 VSY |el=3997 ΠΜΓ |es=3.997 ABY |fi=3997 BBY |fr=3997 av. BY |pl=3997 BBY |pt=3.997 ABY }} [[Category:Years in the Old Sith Wars]]
